This Pokemon is immune to damage from other sources like weather conditions and entry hazards. Unique Ability.This Pokemon's body is protected by an incredible otherworldly aura. Most things get through as if nothing was there.

name: Cursed Body
description: Whenever this Pokemon is dealt damage with a Physical or Special Move, Roll 3 Chance Dice to Disable that Move. Up to 3 Moves may be disabled this way.This Pokemon carries a curse within itself. Crossing this Pokemon is not a good idea.

name: Unaware
description: This Pokemon ignores any Increase or Reduction on the foe's Attributes. This effect applies when dealing and receiving damage from a foe.The Pokemon is oblivious to many details in its surroundings, it will rarely take notice of things going on.

name: Early Bird
description: The time this Pokemon would be asleep is reduced by half and it will only need to score 2 successes on its Insight roll to wake up in battle. This effect does not apply for the Move "Rest".Pokemon with this ability are light sleepers that will easily rise from slumber. They wake up full of energy with just a couple hours of sleep.

name: Electric Surge
description: When this Pokemon comes out, it automatically starts the effects of the Move Electric Terrain. (In case of stalemate the Pokemon with higher Will might keep the dominant Terrain)The Pokemon can surround itself with an electric field that fills the air with tension and keeps everyone on edge.

name: Mummy
description: When this Pokemon hits or gets hit with a Non-Ranged Physical Move, the foe's Ability is changed to Mummy. This Pokemon will curse whoever dares to inflict harm upon them, the curse may even last for generations and will need the aid of a medium to lift it.

name: Stalwart
description: Ignore any Moves or Abilities that would redirect this Pokemon's Moves into another Target. (i.e. The Move "Follow Me", the Ability "Lightining Rod" etc.)The Pokemon naturally has a high sense of duty and loyalty, once you give it a task it will not stay until its quest is complete.

name: Prism Armor
description: Reduce by 2 the total Damage dealt to this Pokemon by a Super Effective Move.This Pokemon's body is an incredibly resilient armor. It can withstand even hits that should shatter it into pieces.

name: Power Construct
description: At the end of the Round, if this Pokemon has half or less of its HP, change its Form to the next one. When this Pokemon changes Form, remove Status Ailments & restore its full HP & Will. Unique Ability.Small cells gather around this Pokemon and are absorbed into its body. It grows bigger and stronger as more cells come together.

name: Steam Engine
description: The first time this Pokemon is dealt damage with a Fire or Water-Type Move. Increase 3 Points to its Dexterity Atribute.The Pokemon works as a steam furnace, with a bit of fire and water it can move anything at great speeds. It also loves to eat coal.

name: Toxic Boost
description: If this Pokemon gets the Poison or Badly Poison Status, Increase its Strength Attribute by 2.The blood of this Pokemon boils whenever it is afflicted by Poison, this fever induces an uncontrollable rage.

name: Berserk
description: When this Pokemon's HP is half or less, Increase its Special Attribute by 2.This Pokemon is usually calm in demeanor, but when its life or someone it cares for is in danger, the adrenaline rush will transform it into an enranged beast.

name: Mycelium Might
description: All Support Moves used by this Pokemon are considered to have the "Never Miss" and "Late Reaction 1" Added EffectThe Pokemon releases invisible fungus spores continuosly, by the time you realize you have a complete fungal infestation around you.

name: Hospitality
description: When this Pokemon comes out, it can spend a Will Point to heal up to 3 HP from a damaged Ally. Lethal Damage is not healed with this effect. Outside of battle it can remove the bitter taste from all healing Herbs.The Pokemon can transform the most bitter herb into a delicious medicinal tea. It will also invite its friends for a cup whenever they have the time.

name: Iron Fist
description: Add 1 Dice to the Damage Pool of Fist Based moves.The hands of this Pokemon are very strong and heavy, when curled into fists they can go through anything.

name: Normalize
description: All the moves known by this Pokemon are considered Normal-Type. Affecting STAB, weaknesses, immunities, and resistances. Add 1 Extra die of Damage Pool of Normal Moves.The Pokemon's actions are never impressive, always dull and never seem to accomplish anything exceptional.

name: Flame Body
description: When hit by a Non-Ranged Physical Move, this Pokemon rolls 3 Chance Dice to inflict 2nd degree Burn on the foe.This Pokemon can willingly ignite its body on fire, receiving no harm from it. Objects that come into contact with this Pokemon may catch fire.

name: Snow Warning
description: When this Pokemon comes out, it automatically starts the effects of Hail/Snow Weather. The effects end when the Pokemon leaves the battle. (In case of stalemate the Pokemon with higher Will might keep the dominant weather)The Pokemon is able to call a terrible hailstorm at will. Snow will cover the battlefield and sharp ice shards will come plummeting from the sky.

name: Embody Aspect
description: Increase by 2 an Attribute of this Pokemon depending on the mask it wears. Teal & Wellspring Mask - Dexterity / Heartflame & Cornerstone Mask - Strength. Unique Ability.This Pokemon's emotions are deeply affected by the masks it wears, its personality changing completely depending on which one it is using.

name: Dazzling
description: Foes cannot use Reaction Moves against this Pokemon. Maneuvers can still be used.Its beautiful scales reflect light in a mirror-like manner, no one can help but to stop in their tracks when they glance at this Pokemon.

name: Ice Body
description: If Hail/Snow Weather is active, you may restore 1 HP to this Pokemon at the end of the Round. This Pokemon is immune to damage from Hail weather.The Pokemon's body is almost frozen, and can cool down enclosed areas in a few minutes. It feels most comfortable when temperatures are below zero.

name: Stench
description: Reduce the chance of wild Pokemon encounters at Storyteller's discretion. Whenever this Pokemon is hit with a Non-Ranged Physical Move, Roll 1 Chance Die to Flinch the foe. This Pokemon can emit a smell so unpleasant it repels other people and Pokemon.

name: Shield Dust
description: This Pokemon is not affected by any effects triggered by Chance Dice of foes.This Pokemon constantly generates specs of dust to shield and protect itself.

name: Transistor
description: Add 2 Extra dice to the Damage Pool of all Physical or Special Electric-Type Moves that this Pokemon performs.This Pokemon's body stores and boosts electric charges. It will constantly be releasing menacing lightning all over the place.

name: Speed Boost
description: At the end of the Round, Increase this Pokemon's Dexterity Attribute by 1. Up to 3 Points might be added this way.This Pokemon will start maneuvering at an accelerated rate, it will move as if it blinked from place to place.

name: Rivalry
description: If this Pokemon targets a foe of the same gender, Increase its Strength Attribute by 1. If the targeted foe is the opposite gender, Reduce its Strength Attribute by 1.The Pokemon will be very competitive with others to prove its position as the alpha of the group, however, it will try to gain the favor of possible mates.

name: Effect Spore
description: If hit by a Non-Ranged Physical Move, the Pokemon rolls 3 Chance Dice to Poison, Paralize or Sleep the foe at random.When stressed, this Pokemon will leak spores through its body that scatter in the air causing severe allergies.

name: Wind Rider
description: Add 1 Extra Die to the Damage Pool of all Wind Moves.This Pokemon can soar no matter if there is a light breeze or a wind tempest raging, a true master of the sky.

name: Storm Drain
description: This Pokémon is immune to Water-Type Damage. If another Pokémon on the field uses a Single-Target Water-Type Move, it will be redirected towards this Pokémon. The first time this Pokémon is hit by a Water-Type move, Increase its Special by 1.The Pokemon absorbs moisture and liquids like a sponge, then uses them to increase its power and last more time outside of water.

name: Teraform Zero
description: Only Terapagos may use this Ability. Remove all Active Effects on the battlefield and negate any Effect on the Battlefield while this Pokemon is out. (Force Fields, Entry Hazards, Terrain, Weather, Abilities etc.) Unique Ability.In this form, Terapagos once held the newly-created world on top of itself. It is well within its power to restore it to its most ancient state.

name: Long Reach
description: All Moves used by this Pokemon are considered to have the "Ranged" Added EffectThe Pokemon is able to attack through the shadows of objects and foes meanwhile the real targets suffer the damage.

name: Cloud Nine
description: Negate the effects of Weather Conditions on this Pokemon.This Pokemon will easily feel pleased, and it's prone to be heappier than others. No matter if it's sunny or rainy it will never feel gloomy.

name: Leaf Guard
description: While Sunny Weather is active, this Pokemon can't have any Status Ailments or Conditions inflicted. Previously inflicted ailments/conditions remain.The leaves on this Pokemon's body expand with the sun to completely cover and shield it from superficial damage. They may need to be pruned often.

name: Supreme Overlord
description: When this Pokemon comes into battle, Increase its Strength and Special Attributes by 1 for every Ally that has Fainted in-battle. Up to 3 points can be increased this way.This Pokemon has a commanding aura and is obsessively ridden with the need to rule over everything, even the ashes of a kingdom.

name: Soundproof
description: This Pokemon is immune to the Damage and Added Effects of all Sound-based moves.This Pokemon's body is structured to protect it from noises that might disturb its peace and focus. So it's not ignoring you, it just can't hear you.

name: Sand Stream
description: When this Pokemon comes out, it automatically starts the effects of Sandstorm Weather. The effects end when the Pokemon leaves the battle. (In case of stalemate the Pokemon with higher Will, might keep the dominant weather)The Pokemon can activate a raging sandstorm around itself that will last for as long as it wants.

name: Hustle
description: This Pokemon gets an Extra Low Accuracy 1 and adds 2 Extra Dice to the Damage pool for all its Physical Moves.The Pokemon will perform everything in a hurry, it keeps itself busy, but it can be kind of sloppy when it rushes something out.

name: Flare Boost
description: If this Pokemon gets any degree of Burn, Increase 2 points to its Special Attribute.A Pokemon with this Ability benefits from the extreme heat produced by fire. But they might be somewhat of a pyromaniac.

name: Corrosion
description: Ignore any immunity the foe has to Poison-Type Damage and/or to be inflicted Poison and Badly Poisoned Status Ailments.This Pokemon's venom can eat through metal, wood, and most inorganic and organic materials. Be careful not to touch it.

name: Teravolt
description: If a Type, Move, Item or Ability would prevent this Pokemon from targeting a foe or inflicting an effect, ignore it. (e.g. A Pokemon with Immunity can be Poisoned, Ground-Type Pokemon can be hit with Electric Moves, etc.) Unique Ability.There's a ball of blue lightning coming out of this Pokemon that prevents its foes from being out of reach, no matter what you do, it will zap you.

name: Fur Coat
description: Reduce by 2 the Damage dealt to this Pokemon by All Physical Moves.This Pokemon's fluffy exterior is cuddly, soft, hypoallergenic, and also serves as a cushion against powerful blows.

name: Well-Baked Body
description: The first time this Pokemon is hit by a Fire-Type Move, Increase its Defense by 2. Fire-type moves do not deal damage to this Pokemon.This Pokemon's body develops a thick bread-like crust when it is exposed to heat, filling the air with a buttery aroma.

name: Steelworker
description: Steel-Type Moves used by this Pokemon get 1 Extra Die to their Damage Pool.The Pokemon is capable of molding and eating steel, giving shape and a sharper edge to any metal it touches.

name: Unnerve
description: Foes cannot consume their held berry or recycled berries while this Pokemon is in the field.It may be its powerful gaze or its menacing presence, but others near this Pokemon become really nervous to the point where they lose their appetite.

name: Libero
description: Whenever this Pokemon is about to roll the Accuracy of a Move, change its type to match that of the Move. If the Move is Physical or Special and deals damage, use the appropriate STAB on the Damage Roll.This Pokemon always has its mind in the game. It will favor a defensive position and make the best special passes when it finally attacks.

name: Intimidate
description: When this Pokemon comes into battle, Reduce by 1 the Strength of All foes in Range. This effect will last for as long as this Pokemon is out. Outside of battle, wild Pokemon will avoid the party if this Pokemon is out.This Pokemon has an overwhelming presence that inspires both fear and respect from others.
